violations.text: Cambros of coffee beans were observed stored on the floor in the coffee roasting are. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025
Poured epoxy on counters in barista area was observed in poor repair. Equipment to be in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2025
Hot water pressure at handwashing sinks in the kitchen and barista area are inadequate. Sufficient water pressure ensures adequate sanitation. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2025

Ice machine condensate line was observed draining into the mop sink. Condensate line for ice machine must drain into an air gapped drain or other suitable method. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2024
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2024
